note: Day 28 (Friday). POST-CAMPAIGN MILESTONE. Yesterday (Day 27) saw the final sends of the entire Batch 1-4 campaign cohort: fu_046-049 (leads 52/55/50/56, breakup emails, 09:00-09:45). All active email sequences are now assumed complete. IMAP gap is now 21 days (last confirmed: 2026-04-04). No Batch 5 Ryedale data received. Today BRAIN is also due to write the full post-campaign analysis (see daily_signals.json campaign_milestone note).

batch_5_linkedin_strategy.status: READY — templates and rules prepared. Awaiting Batch 5 Ryedale data.
batch_5_linkedin_strategy.confirmed_winner_sectors: SSL leads with full names — 3 of 3 INTERESTED leads used SSL+PAS+first-name-subject. Prioritise high-LinkedIn sectors: solicitors, estate agents, B&Bs, restaurants, care providers.
batch_5_linkedin_strategy.first_name_only_rule: Skip LinkedIn if first name only AND low-LinkedIn trade (electrician, plumber, roofer, joiner, builder). Attempt if first name only AND high-LinkedIn sector (care, leisure, solicitor, accountant, restaurant owner).
batch_5_linkedin_strategy.post_reference_priority: HANDS: check each profile for recent posts (60 days) BEFORE sending any note. post_reference achieves 3-4x higher acceptance rate. Do not split search and send across days — execute in one session.
batch_5_linkedin_strategy.window: Day 3 to Day 6 inclusive after initial email. This is a narrow window — execution must happen within the same BRAIN-run day.

next_linkedin_window.trigger: Batch 5 Ryedale data received AND initial emails sent AND 3+ days elapsed since those sends

scenario_a.brain_copy_written: Today (Friday) — BRAIN writes initial email copy
scenario_a.notes: Weekend sends not recommended — open rates lower. Monday send is optimal.

scenario_c.condition: Batch 5 data not received by Friday EOD
scenario_c.consequence: Campaign gap extends to 21+ days. Every additional day without new leads is a day without prospecting. HANDS: Ryedale scrape is the single highest-priority action remaining.

post_campaign_analysis_note: Today (Friday 2026-04-25) BRAIN is due to write the full Week 4 / post-campaign analysis. This is separate from the LinkedIn intelligence function but feeds into Batch 5 strategy. Key LinkedIn finding: ZERO confirmed LinkedIn contacts in entire Batch 1-4 campaign (60+ leads, 28 days, 7+ BRAIN runs with active notes). Root cause: HANDS execution latency. The 3-6 day window cannot be recovered once missed. Revised protocol for Batch 5: HANDS must execute LinkedIn searches within 2 hours of each BRAIN run on Day 3, 4, 5, or 6.
